question_text: Which statement best explains why a black object appears black?

options.label: A
options.text: It reflects all colours of light equally

options.label: B
options.text: It absorbs all colours of light and reflects very little

options.label: D
options.text: It reflects only some colours and absorbs others

explanation: Black objects absorb nearly all colours of visible light and reflect very little, so very little light reaches your eyes. This is why they appear black rather than coloured.
